name: Mk32 Cannon
customPrimary: Hits on hull cause internal spalling, dealing damage based on the mass of the target.

name: Mk300 Laser Cannon
customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor frequently arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage. Hits on shields have a chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.

name: AN/SEQ-3 (Beam)
customPrimary: Disrupts the target's shields, increasing all shield damage taken by %s for one full-power graviton beam, %s for two, and %s for three or more hitting the shields at the same time.
